title: Croatia Long-Term (Type D) National Visa Application (Viza D)
description: Give the details for Croatia's long-term national visa application, 'ZAHTJEV ZA DUGOTRAJNU VIZU (VIZA D)' (DODATAK 1.B), published by the Ministarstvo vanjskih i europskih poslova (MVEP, Ministry of Foreign and European Affairs) — the visa a non-EU/EEA/Swiss national needs before travelling to Croatia for a stay exceeding the 90-day Schengen short-stay limit. Opens Croatia's Visa vertical (the country's 3rd of 6 verticals, after Taxes and Business Formation). This document models the form's opening Schengen-harmonized identity block (items 1-9: surname, former surname, first names, date/place/country of birth, nationality, sex, marital status); a minors' guardian block (item 10); Croatia's own national identification number field (item 11, the applicant's home-country national ID number, distinct from a Croatian OIB); the travel-document block (items 12-16); contact, third-country-residence, and occupation/employer details (items 17-20); a temporary-residence pre-approval sub-block genuinely specific to Croatia's own two-step residence/visa construct (item 21: approval number, issuing police administration/station, validity dates); an 11-category purpose-of-stay taxonomy (item 22) that includes digital-nomad, EEA-long-term-resident, and posted-worker categories with no counterpart in Germany's already-modelled 6-category enum; entry/arrival details (items 23-27); a family-reunification sponsor sub-block (item 28: relationship, sponsor's name/DOB/nationality/residence-permit/address); an employer/educational-establishment-in-Croatia contact block (item 29); the intended-accommodation address in Croatia (item 30); and a documents[] checklist derived from the form's own 'Priložena dokumentacija' (attached documentation) office-use checklist and its page-1 photo box. It deliberately does NOT model: the office-use-only right-margin administrative columns (application date/number, HVIS reference, case handler, visa decision, validity/entries granted); any purpose-specific supplementary annex a Croatian diplomatic mission or consular office may request in addition to this base form for a given purpose (e.g. a digital-nomad income-threshold declaration, or a posted-worker assignment letter); and administrative-unit cascades (e.g. an enumerated list of Croatian police administrations/stations, or of countries) — all such fields are modelled as free text. A prior GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-2883) had screened this same source and characterized it as a field-for-field duplicate of the already-modelled de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application, without independently re-deriving the comparison; this document corrects that finding after a fresh field-by-field pass (see VERIFICATION.md): past the two forms' shared ~9-item Schengen-harmonized identity block, Croatia's form has substantial content absent from Germany's (the national-ID field, the temporary-residence pre-approval sub-block, the 11-category purpose taxonomy, the family-reunification sponsor sub-block, and the employer/school-in-Croatia block), while Germany's form has substantial content absent from Croatia's (spouse, children, and parents sections, a prior-Germany-stays history, accommodation-type and permanent-residence-abroad questions, references in Germany, health-insurance coverage, and criminal-conviction/notifiable-disease disclosures) — the same kind of divergent, non-duplicate outcome already established for Spain's es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional against this same German template. It does not submit the application; the live source is always authoritative.

source.documentRef: DODATAK 1.B — Obrazac zahtjeva za dugotrajnu vizu (viza D) / ZAHTJEV ZA DUGOTRAJNU VIZU (VIZA D) (Application form for a long-term visa (Visa D))

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-2902), a follow-on to GOV-2883/GOV-2887/GOV-2892. Opens Croatia's Visa vertical (3 of 6, after Taxes and Business Formation). A prior cycle (GOV-2883) had screened this same MVEP long-term-visa source and, on a shallow comparison, characterized it as a field-for-field duplicate of de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application, so it was not authored then. This cycle independently re-fetched the source directly from mvep.gov.hr (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 678,426 bytes, sha256 09f556946c286a349ecb7cfea2078a6dfd0233c975c252d030fe4faabe857ec3), re-extracted it in full with pdfjs-dist, and re-fetched/re-read de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application's own committed schema and source PDF for a genuine field-by-field re-comparison. Finding: the prior duplicate characterization does not hold up past the two forms' shared ~9-item Schengen-harmonized identity block — see VERIFICATION.md for the full side-by-side comparison. Authored on the corrected finding that this is a genuine, non-duplicate candidate, the same kind of reversal already established for es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional against this same German template.

fields.name: nationalityAtBirth
fields.label: Državljanstvo pri rođenju, ako se razlikuje

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: 9. Bračno stanje
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Neoženjen/neudana (Single), Oženjen/udana (Married), Životno partnerstvo (Registered partnership), Razdvojen (Separated), Rastavljen (Divorced), Udovac/udovica (Widowed), Ostalo (Other, with a free-text specify line). Independent AcroForm-style checkbox widgets on the paper layout (this edition prints as static boxes, not fillable widgets — see VERIFICATION.md); modelled as a single enum since the form's own layout presents them as one mutually exclusive choice, the same convention this registry applies to comparable checkbox groups (e.g. es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional's own maritalStatus).

fields.name: guardianDetails
fields.label: 10. Osoba s roditeljskim pravom (u slučaju maloljetnika) / zakonski zastupnik: prezime, ime, adresa (ako se razlikuje od podnositeljeve), broj telefona, adresa e-pošte i državljanstvo
fields.description: A single free-text box collecting a minor applicant's parental-authority holder or legal guardian's full details. The form does not itself carry a separate 'is the applicant a minor?' checkbox to gate this field on, so it is left ungated rather than fabricating a condition the source does not state.

fields.name: nationalIdentificationNumber
fields.label: 11. Državni identifikacijski broj (ako je primjenjivo)
fields.description: The applicant's national identification number issued by their own country of nationality/residence, where applicable — not a Croatian OIB (Croatia's own personal identification number, used elsewhere in this registry's hr/porezna-uprava and hr/portor schemas). This field genuinely has no counterpart on de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application's own field list.

fields.name: travelDocumentType
fields.label: 12. Vrsta putne isprave
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Obična putovnica (Ordinary passport), Diplomatska putovnica (Diplomatic passport), Službena putovnica (Service passport), Posebna putovnica (Special passport), Ostalo/Druga putna isprava (Other, with a free-text specify line).

fields.name: otherTravelDocumentTypeDetails
fields.label: 12. Vrsta putne isprave — Druga putna isprava (molimo navedite)

fields.name: applicantAddressAndEmail
fields.label: 17. Adresa i adresa e-pošte podnositelja zahtjeva
fields.description: The source presents postal address and e-mail address as a single combined free-text box, not two separate boxes; modelled as one field rather than splitting a structure the source itself does not split, the same non-fabrication discipline es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional applied to its own homeAddressAndEmail field.

fields.name: residesInCountryOtherThanNationality
fields.label: 18. Boravak u zemlji različitoj od zemlje sadašnjeg državljanstva

fields.name: employerOrEducationalEstablishmentAbroad
fields.label: 20. Poslodavac, njegova adresa i broj telefona. Za studente/učenike naziv i adresa obrazovne ustanove

fields.name: temporaryResidenceApprovalNumber
fields.label: 21. Odobrenje za privremeni boravak/dozvole za boravak i rad — Broj odobrenja
fields.description: Part of Croatia's own two-step temporary-residence/visa construct: a pre-approval for temporary residence and/or a residence-and-work permit, granted before this visa application, that the applicant cites here. No counterpart exists on de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application.

fields.name: temporaryResidenceApprovalIssuedByPoliceAuthority
fields.label: 21. Izdana od (navesti naziv policijske uprave/policijske postaje)
fields.description: Name of the police administration/station (policijska uprava/policijska postaja) that issued the temporary-residence approval in temporaryResidenceApprovalNumber. Modelled as free text; the form does not print a closed list of Croatia's police administrations/stations to enumerate as an enum (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: purposeOfStay
fields.label: 22. Privremeni boravak odobren u Republici Hrvatskoj u svrhu
fields.description: The form's own 11-option checkbox grid, Croatia's own residence/visa-purpose taxonomy: Spajanja obitelji (Family reunification), Rada (Work), Srednjoškolskog obrazovanja (Secondary education), Rada upućenog radnika (Posted worker's work), Studiranja (Study), Boravka osobe s dugotrajnim boravištem u drugoj državi članici EGP-a (Stay of a person with long-term residence in another EEA member state), Istraživanja (Research), Boravka digitalnih nomada (Digital-nomad stay), Humanitarnog razloga (Humanitarian reason), U druge svrhe (Other purposes), Životnog partnerstva (Registered/life partnership). Independently re-extracted this cycle via coordinate-adjacent two-column text-layer reading (see VERIFICATION.md); confirms 11 categories, including three (posted-worker work, EEA-long-term-resident stay, digital-nomad stay) with no counterpart in de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application's own 6-value purposeOfStay enum (Employment/Study/Au pair/Language course/Family reunion/Other).

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequested
fields.label: 24. Broj zatraženih ulazaka
fields.description: Jedan ulazak (Single entry) or Više ulazaka (Multiple entries).

fields.name: fingerprintsPreviouslyCollected
fields.label: 27. Prethodno pohranjeni otisci prstiju u svrhu podnošenja zahtjeva za hrvatsku vizu

fields.name: priorVisaFingerprintDate
fields.label: 27. Da. Datum (ako je poznat)
fields.description: The form's own hedge ('ako je poznat' / 'if known') makes this non-strict even when fingerprintsPreviouslyCollected is true, so it is left ungated rather than asserting a requiredWhen tie the source itself qualifies away.

fields.name: priorVisaNumber
fields.label: 27. broj vize (ako je poznat)
fields.description: Same 'ako je poznat' (if known) hedge as priorVisaFingerprintDate — left ungated for the same reason.

fields.name: familyReunificationRelationship
fields.label: 28. U slučaju spajanja obitelji navesti obiteljsku vezu s članom obitelji u Republici Hrvatskoj
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Bračni drug (Spouse), Izvanbračni drug (Unmarried/de facto partner), Životni partner (Registered partner), Maloljetno dijete (Minor child), Drugi srodnik (Other relative, with a free-text specify line).

fields.name: familyMemberResidencePermitTypeAndNumber
fields.label: 28. Ako član obitelji nije hrvatski državljanin navesti vrstu i broj boravišne dozvole
fields.description: Applies only when the family member in Croatia is not a Croatian national. The form does not gate this with its own separate checkbox distinct from familyReunificationRelationship, so it is left ungated rather than fabricating a condition the source does not state.

fields.name: familyMemberAddressPhoneEmail
fields.label: 28. Adresa, telefon, adresa e-pošte člana obitelji

fields.name: employerOrEducationalEstablishmentInCroatia
fields.label: 29. Naziv, adresa, telefon, adresa e-pošte poslodavca/obrazovne ustanove u Republici Hrvatskoj
fields.description: Distinct from employerOrEducationalEstablishmentAbroad (item 20): this is the applicant's prospective employer or educational establishment inside Croatia, genuinely absent from de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application. The printed item carries no conditional header narrowing it to a purposeOfStay subset (unlike es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional's own employer/school blocks, which do print such headers), so it is left ungated rather than fabricating a gate the source does not state.

fields.name: intendedAccommodationAddressInCroatia
fields.label: 30. Adresa planiranog smještaja u Republici Hrvatskoj

documents.label: Prijevozno sredstvo / Proof of means of transport
Putno zdravstveno osiguranje / Travel health insurance
documents.sourceRef: DODATAK 1.B p.1, 'Priložena dokumentacija' checklist: 'Putno zdravstveno osiguranje'

documents.label: Applicant's closing signature declaration
documents.statement: Izjavljujem da su, prema mojem najboljem znanju, svi navedeni podaci točni i potpuni. Svjestan/svjesna sam da bilo koja moja lažna izjava može dovesti do toga da zahtjev bude odbijen, ili do poništenja već dobivene vize te također zbog toga mogu biti sudski gonjen/gonjena prema zakonodavstvu Republike Hrvatske.

steps.title: Podaci o podnositelju zahtjeva / Applicant's identity
Maloljetnici i putna isprava / Minors and travel document
Kontakt i boravak / Contact and residence
Odobrenje za privremeni boravak / Temporary-residence pre-approval
Svrha boravka i putovanja / Purpose of stay and journey details
Prethodni zahtjevi za vizu / Prior visa history
Poslodavac/obrazovna ustanova u Republici Hrvatskoj / Employer or educational establishment in Croatia
Smještaj i potpis / Accommodation and signature
